compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement timestamp ordering for LINK/UNLINK events in process_outbound
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Add timestamp-based sorting for LINK and UNLINK events within process_outbound() before the main event processing loop. This ensures LINK/UNLINK events are processed in chronological order to prevent state inconsistencies.

## Implementation Details
- Before the main for-loop in process_outbound(), sort the filtered events list
- Sort key: event timestamp (from event file data)
- Only LINK and UNLINK events need timestamp ordering; other event types maintain original order
- Use stable sort to preserve relative order of non-LINK/UNLINK events

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/bridge-outbound.py (Edit: add pre-sort step in process_outbound)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] LINK/UNLINK events sorted by timestamp before processing
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "timestamp_order" --tb=short -q
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py --tb=short -q
